languages.text: Гортанный рык Иджрига, исполненный гнева и презрения к врагу, прозвучал, словно взрыв крак-гранаты. Заслышав его, зарковцы мгновенно вышли из оцепенения. Солдаты вскакивали один за одним, сжимая зубы и утирая кровь, выступившую из ушей, — подхватывали и несли тех, кто уже не мог идти сам. Стоицизм поколений, веками выживавших в пустошах мира-фронтира, сделал их сопротивление страху незыблемым.

Izdrig's guttural roar, full of fury and contempt for the enemy, thundered like an exploding krak grenade. Hearing it jolted the Zarkovians out of their stupor at once. One after another, the soldiers jumped to their feet, clenching their teeth and wiping off the blood that seeped from their ears. They picked up and carried those who could no longer walk. The stoicism of the generations who had survived in the badlands of a frontier world for centuries had imbued them with an unshakeable resistance to fear.

Стоицизм поколений, веками выживавших в пустошах мира-фронтира, сделал их сопротивление страху незыблемым.

traits.locale_text: Izdrig's guttural roar, full of fury and disdain for the enemy, thundered like a krak grenade explosion. Hearing it jolted the Zarkovians out of their stupor at once. One after another, the soldiers jumped to their feet, clenching their teeth and wiping off the blood that seeped from their ears. They picked up and carried those who could no longer walk. The calm fortitude of generations of frontier-world dwellers who had survived in its badlands for centuries had imbued them with an unshakable resistance to fear.

One after another, the soldiers jumped to their feet, clenching their teeth and wiping off the blood that seeped from their ears. They picked up and carried those who could no longer walk. The stoicism of the generations who had survived in the badlands of a frontier world for centuries had imbued them with an unshakable resistance to fear.

languages.text: El rugido gutural de Izdrig, lleno de furia y desprecio hacia el enemigo, fue tan atronador como la explosión de una granada perforante y sacó a los zarkovianos de su estupor. Uno tras otro, los soldados se pusieron en pie, apretando los dientes y secándose la sangre de los oídos. Levantaron a los que ya no podían andar y cargaron con ellos. El estoicismo de las generaciones que habían sobrevivido durante siglos en las tierras baldías de un mundo fronterizo les había otorgado una resistencia inquebrantable al miedo.
languages.original_text: Izdrig's guttural roar, full of fury and contempt for the enemy, thundered like an exploding krak grenade. Hearing it jolted the Zarkovians out of their stupor at once. One after another, the soldiers jumped to their feet, clenching their teeth and wiping off the blood that seeped from their ears. They picked up and carried those who could no longer walk. The stoicism of the generations who had survived in the badlands of a frontier world for centuries had imbued them with an unshakeable resistance to fear.

Uno tras otro, los soldados se pusieron en pie, apretando los dientes y secándose la sangre de los oídos. Levantaron a los que ya no podían andar y cargaron con ellos. El estoicismo de las generaciones que habían sobrevivido durante siglos en las tierras baldías de un mundo fronterizo les había otorgado una resistencia inquebrantable al miedo.

languages.text: Le rugissement guttural d'Izdrig, empreint de fureur et de mépris pour l'ennemi, retentit telle l'explosion d'une grenade Krak, tirant aussitôt les Zarkoviens de leur torpeur. Les uns après les autres, les soldats se relevèrent d'un bond, serrant les dents et essuyant le sang qui coulait de leurs oreilles, aidant de leur mieux ceux qui ne pouvaient plus marcher. Après avoir survécu des siècles durant sur les terres inhospitalières d'un monde frontalier, ils semblaient insensibles à la peur.
languages.original_text: Izdrig's guttural roar, full of fury and contempt for the enemy, thundered like an exploding krak grenade. Hearing it jolted the Zarkovians out of their stupor at once. One after another, the soldiers jumped to their feet, clenching their teeth and wiping off the blood that seeped from their ears. They picked up and carried those who could no longer walk. The stoicism of the generations who had survived in the badlands of a frontier world for centuries had imbued them with an unshakeable resistance to fear.

Les uns après les autres, les soldats se relevèrent d'un bond, serrant les dents et essuyant le sang qui coulait de leurs oreilles, aidant de leur mieux ceux qui ne pouvaient plus marcher. Après avoir survécu des siècles durant sur les terres inhospitalières d'un monde frontalier, ils semblaient insensibles à la peur.

languages.text: 伊兹德里格那充满愤怒与蔑视的嘶吼，如同爆裂的穿甲手雷般轰然炸响。这吼声立刻将扎尔科夫人从恍惚中惊醒。士兵们一个接一个地跃起。他们咬紧牙关，抹去从耳中渗出的鲜血，又扶起、扛走了那些再也无力行走的人。几代人于边境世界的恶土上挣扎求生，从而洗礼出来的这份坚忍，让他们在面对恐惧时无可动摇。
languages.original_text: Izdrig's guttural roar, full of fury and contempt for the enemy, thundered like an exploding krak grenade. Hearing it jolted the Zarkovians out of their stupor at once. One after another, the soldiers jumped to their feet, clenching their teeth and wiping off the blood that seeped from their ears. They picked up and carried those who could no longer walk. The stoicism of the generations who had survived in the badlands of a frontier world for centuries had imbued them with an unshakeable resistance to fear.

traits.locale_text: 伊兹德里格那充满愤怒与蔑视的嘶吼，如同爆裂的穿甲手雷般轰然炸响。这吼声立刻将扎尔科夫人从恍惚中惊醒。士兵们一个接一个地跃起。他们咬紧牙关，抹去从耳中渗出的鲜血，又扶起、扛走了那些再也无力行走的人。几代人于边境世界的恶土上挣扎求生，从而洗礼出来的这份坚忍，让他们在面对恐惧时无可动摇。

languages.text: Izdrigs kehliges Brüllen, das seinen ganzen Zorn und seine Verachtung für den Feind zum Ausdruck brachte, war ebenso laut wie eine explodierende Sprenggranate. Sein Klang riss die Zarkovianer sofort aus ihrer Lethargie. Einer nach dem anderen sprangen die Soldaten auf, bissen die Zähne aufeinander und wischten sich das aus ihren Ohren sickernde Blut ab. Wer selbst nicht mehr gehen konnte, wurde von ihnen getragen. Der Stoizismus der Generationen, die seit Jahrhunderten im Ödland einer Grenzwelt überlebt hatten, hatte sie mit einer unerschütterlichen Furchtlosigkeit beseelt.
languages.original_text: Izdrig's guttural roar, full of fury and contempt for the enemy, thundered like an exploding krak grenade. Hearing it jolted the Zarkovians out of their stupor at once. One after another, the soldiers jumped to their feet, clenching their teeth and wiping off the blood that seeped from their ears. They picked up and carried those who could no longer walk. The stoicism of the generations who had survived in the badlands of a frontier world for centuries had imbued them with an unshakeable resistance to fear.

languages.text: İzdrig'in öfke ve düşmana karşı nefret dolu gırtlaktan gelen kükremesi, patlayan bir krak bombası gibi gürledi. Bunu duymak, Zarkovluları anında sarsarak kendilerine getirdi. Askerler birbiri ardına ayağa fırladı, dişlerini sıktı ve kulaklarından sızan kanı sildi. Artık yürüyemeyenleri alıp taşıdılar. Yüzyıllar boyunca bir sınır dünyasının çorak topraklarında hayatta kalan nesillerin metaneti, onlara korkuya karşı sarsılmaz bir direnç aşılamıştı.
languages.original_text: Izdrig's guttural roar, full of fury and contempt for the enemy, thundered like an exploding krak grenade. Hearing it jolted the Zarkovians out of their stupor at once. One after another, the soldiers jumped to their feet, clenching their teeth and wiping off the blood that seeped from their ears. They picked up and carried those who could no longer walk. The stoicism of the generations who had survived in the badlands of a frontier world for centuries had imbued them with an unshakeable resistance to fear.

Askerler birbiri ardına ayağa fırladı, dişlerini sıktı ve kulaklarından sızan kanı sildi. Artık yürüyemeyenleri alıp taşıdılar. Yüzyıllar boyunca bir sınır dünyasının çorak topraklarında hayatta kalan nesillerin metaneti, onlara korkuya karşı sarsılmaz bir direnç aşılamıştı.

languages.text: 敵への怒りと蔑みを込めたイズドリーグの唸り声は、爆発するクラックグレネードのように轟いた。その音に、ザルコビアンの兵士たちは、一瞬で意識を取り戻した。次々と兵士たちは立ち上がり、歯を食いしばり、耳から滲み出る血を拭き取った。そして、歩けなくなった兵士たちを担いだ。悪土の荒野で何世紀にも渡って生き延びてきた世代の無敵の精神は、彼らに揺るぎない恐怖への抵抗力を与えていた。
languages.original_text: Izdrig's guttural roar, full of fury and contempt for the enemy, thundered like an exploding krak grenade. Hearing it jolted the Zarkovians out of their stupor at once. One after another, the soldiers jumped to their feet, clenching their teeth and wiping off the blood that seeped from their ears. They picked up and carried those who could no longer walk. The stoicism of the generations who had survived in the badlands of a frontier world for centuries had imbued them with an unshakeable resistance to fear.

traits.locale_text: 敵への怒りと蔑みを込めたイズドリーグの唸り声は、爆発するクラックグレネードのように轟いた。その音に、ザルコビアンの兵士たちは、一瞬で意識を取り戻した。次々と兵士たちは立ち上がり、歯を食いしばり、耳から滲み出る血を拭き取った。そして、歩けなくなった兵士たちを担いだ。悪土の荒野で何世紀にも渡って生き延びてきた世代の無敵の精神は、彼らに揺るぎない恐怖への抵抗力を与えていた。
